[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111110000 5
1 111100101 6
2 101011001 5
3 101011100 5
4 101100111 6
5 111111111 a
6 110100011 5
7 111111111 a
